rules.description: Calibration offset capped at ±3 points (was ±15, drifted to -9.28)
rules.problem: Tuner calibration_offset drove to -9.28, cancelling quality boosts and blocking all signals

rules.description: Scout/Overseer/Exit agents now respect LLM_MODE=0 gate
rules.problem: Scout/Overseer/Exit called LLM APIs when LLM_MODE=0, causing 50 rejections in 70 min
rules.fix_applied: position_wiring.py:660, llm_integration.py:969,1142,1220 — should_call_llm() guard added

rules.description: Proven-setup table rebuilt as (symbol, side, strategy) 3-tuple
rules.problem: Table collapsed (symbol,side) dimensions, treating SOL_SELL differently per strategy as same
rules.fix_applied: ensemble.py:2293 — comment confirms Finding 11 rewrite; 3-tuple format implemented

rules.description: Trailing-SL exits now correctly labeled CLEAN_WIN vs CLEAN_LOSS
rules.problem: position_manager.py:1215 returned CLEAN_LOSS for profitable trailed-SL exits
rules.fix_applied: position_manager.py:1296 — 'CLEAN_WIN if win else CLEAN_LOSS'

rules.description: L1 sector cap raised from 0.60 to 1.50 to allow multi-position portfolio
rules.problem: 60% l1 cap with 40% notional per position left room for only 1-2 positions despite 8 slots
rules.fix_applied: sector_exposure.py:55 — l1: 1.50

rules.description: Morning session (06:00-12:00 UTC) consistently wins 71% across instruments
rules.problem: Non-morning sessions win only 33-50% — strong time-of-day filter needed
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate active at 20% — track treatment_wr vs baseline_wr=0.35
rules.action: Boost confidence floor by +5 points for morning-window signals; reduce by -10 for night/afternoon

rules.description: Illiquid regime wins only 28% WR on 57 trades — systematic noise-stop problem [Gate escalated 20%→50% on 2026-04-28: 71.9% noise stop rate on 57 trades is definitive.]
rules.problem: 57 illiquid-regime trades at 28% WR = structurally losing setup; stops hit in noise
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate active at 20% — 20% of illiquid signals routed to tighter-stop treatment
rules.action: Reduce position size 50% in illiquid regime; widen stops 30%; require confidence >72%
rules.escalation_reason: 57 live trades @ 28.1% WR + 71.9% noise-stop rate — escalate 50→80%

rules.description: Night session (00:00-06:00 UTC) wins only 15% WR on 13 trades — structurally losing
rules.problem: Night session: 15% WR on 13 trades across 108 insight records. Confidence floor too low for illiquid overnight conditions.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate active at 20% — 20% of night signals get +10pt confidence floor boost treatment
rules.action: Raise confidence floor to 75% during night (00:00-06:00 UTC); if still <45% WR after 20 trades, suspend night trading
rules.escalation_reason: Night 00-06 UTC: 7-15% WR on 13 trades. Full trading suspension. Meta_learning n=13, conf=100%.

rules.source: meta_learning/insights — size edge confirmed across 50 trades
rules.description: Large positions (>5x leverage) win 57-60% WR vs 31-40% for smaller positions
rules.problem: Confidence-proportional sizing not calibrated; low-confidence trades taking same size as high-confidence
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate active at 20% — confidence-proportional caps: <75% conf → max 3x, 75-85% → max 5x, >85% → full
rules.action: Cap leverage at 3x for conf<75%, 5x for conf 75-85%, full leverage only for conf>85%

rules.description: BB solo signals = 67.6% WR. Boost BB-only signals +8pt confidence; ensemble solo-BB path.
rules.problem: Ensemble down-weights solo BB signals, but BB alone outperforms any multi-strat combo
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — route 20% of BB-solo signals with +8pt confidence boost applied
rules.action: ensemble.py: when only BB/confidence_scorer fires, add +8 to signal confidence before gating
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=95%, n=2172>=30: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

rules.description: BB+MTQ co-agreement = 35% WR (contra-indicator). Apply -10pt confidence penalty when both fire.
rules.problem: Ensemble BOOSTS on multi-strategy agreement, but BB+MTQ is anti-predictive
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — -10pt confidence penalty when BB and multi_tier_quality co-fire
rules.action: ensemble.py: detect BB+MTQ co-agreement pattern; subtract 10 from final confidence
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=92%, n=2172>=25: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

rules.description: After 2+ wins: 74-77% WR. After 2+ losses: 28-29% WR. Apply streak size multiplier.
rules.problem: Bot uses flat sizing regardless of streak; momentum signal is high-confidence and validated
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 2+ wins: 1.3x size; 2+ losses: 0.5x size via recent_outcomes check
rules.action: risk.py / position_manager: check adaptive_risk_state recent_outcomes[-2:] before sizing
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=90%, n=2172>=30: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

rules.description: Conf 60-70% = 42% WR avg +$2.19. High conf (>80%) is WORSE. Disable Opus upgrade for >80%.
rules.problem: Cost routing spends most on >80% conf signals which have the WORST outcomes
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — model routing: >80% conf uses Sonnet not Opus; 60-70% treated as high-quality
rules.action: usage_tiers.py: cap model at Sonnet for triggers where confidence>80%; invert confidence boost
rules.suspension_reason: 965-trade full backtest shows 60-70% conf = 46.3% WR, -$18.87/trade (WORST bin). Not a sweet spot. Contradicts this rule's premise. See CONF_CALIBRATION_RESOLVED.

data_contradiction.live_data: conf 60-70% = 46% WR, avg -$18.87 (n=123) — WORST performing bin
data_contradiction.live_data_winner: conf 90%+ = 56% WR, avg +$32.33 (n=91) — BEST dollar performer
data_contradiction.recommendation: REVIEW: rule may be inverting model routing in wrong direction. Downgrading high-conf to Sonnet could cost ~$32/trade vs $7.67

rules.description: ETH_SELL_BB = 70% WR. Trending-ETH = 71% WR avg +$9.49. Tier-1 golden setup.
rules.problem: ETH SELL + BB not specifically promoted in proven_setups; highest-edge known setup undertreated
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — ETH SELL BB: +10pt confidence, bypass veto suppression at 20% rate
rules.action: ensemble.py proven_setups: add ETH_SELL_BB as tier-1; allow full size; +10pt confidence
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=95%, n=20>=20: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

escalation_history.reason: n=20 at min threshold, conf=95% — promote to wide test

rules.description: HYPE_SELL_BB = 35% WR. Worst BB setup. Block HYPE short BB signals or apply -15pt penalty.
rules.problem: HYPE shorts on BB are a known losing setup; no explicit block exists
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — HYPE SELL BB signals: -15pt confidence penalty applied
rules.action: ensemble.py: detect HYPE SELL + BB pattern; apply -15 confidence penalty
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=92%, n=2172>=20: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

rules.source: meta_learning/insights — timing_edge, validated n=27+ across multiple windows
rules.description: Evening session (18:00-24:00 UTC) — originally claimed 62-65% WR, DEESCALATED: post-dedup evidence shows baseline_wr=36%; meta_learning invalidated evening boost idea at 33% WR. Probe at 20% gate pending outcome.
rules.problem: Evening edge consistently validated across 20+ insights but no active rule promotes it
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — evening signals get +8pt confidence boost; raise floor to 58%
rules.action: core/signal_pipeline.py or ensemble.py: detect hour 18-23 UTC, apply +8pt confidence boost
rules.deescalation_reason: INSIGHTS_DEDUP_INVALIDATION: Rule was escalated to 80% gate based on meta_learning/insights.json evidence (n=27+, claimed 62-65% WR). After INSIGHTS_DEDUPLICATION_PRUNING (108->19 entries, 2026-05-18), the 89 duplicate entries inflating this claim were removed. Internal baseline_wr=0.36 (36%) contradicts claimed 62-65% WR. Meta_learning correctly invalidated idea_2238f358 (evening boost) at 33% WR. Rule applied without outcome tracking (treatment_wr=null). De-escalating to 20% probe gate pending post-restart live outcome measurement. Confidence: 0.82.

rules.description: 89% of all losses are instant SL hits (<6 min). Stop width 0.859% avg is too tight.
rules.problem: 370 of 415 losses hit SL in <6 min = entry timing/stop width issue. Instant stops = -$83K backtest.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — minimum stop width forced to 1.2% (up from ~0.86% avg)
rules.action: execution/leverage.py or signal_pipeline.py: enforce min stop_width = max(sl, entry * 0.012)
rules.expected_impact: Reducing instant SL rate from 38.3% to <20% could add $40K+ in backtest PnL
rules.gate_escalated_reason: CRITICAL: 100% of 370 SL hits instant in backtest. Min stop width 0.828% confirmed too tight. Escalate to 50%.

rules.description: HYPE: 55% WR but -$5,014 PnL (397 trades). SOL: 59% WR, +$5,487. HYPE losers avg 2x bigger than wins.
rules.problem: HYPE losses are disproportionately large vs wins. Net negative despite positive WR.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — HYPE position size capped at 0.5x normal sizing
rules.action: execution/leverage.py: if symbol==HYPE, multiply size_multiplier by 0.5

rules.source: meta_learning/insights — side_bias, validated 6+ readings across time
rules.description: LONG bias: 74-82% of trades are LONG but LONG WR = 29-32%; SHORT WR = 56-83%
rules.problem: Bot structurally over-generates LONG signals that underperform SHORT by 24-51 WR points; no corrective filter exists
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — non-golden LONG signals get -8pt confidence penalty; BTC_BUY_BB and SOL_BUY_BB exempt
rules.action: ensemble.py: if side==BUY and (symbol,strategy) not in golden_setups, apply -8 to final confidence
rules.expected_impact: Reducing LONG noise toward SHORT-side WR level could shift overall WR from 35% toward 42%+
rules.gate_escalated_reason: Live 10d data confirms LONG WR=57.1%=SHORT: n=300>=50, conf=90%. Escalate to 50%.

rules.description: SUSPEND confidence_60_70_sweet_spot: live data CONTRADICTS rule. Conf 90%+ = 56% WR +$32.33 (BEST); 60-70% = 46% WR -$18.87 (WORST)
rules.problem: confidence_60_70_sweet_spot rule currently downgrading 90%+ conf trades from Opus to Sonnet — exactly backwards vs live outcomes
rules.fix_applied: confidence_60_70_sweet_spot marked SUSPENDED; revert usage_tiers.py to natural routing: >80% conf → Opus
rules.action: usage_tiers.py: REVERT the Sonnet-downgrade for high-confidence signals added in confidence_60_70_sweet_spot. Restore Opus for conf>80%
rules.expected_impact: Restoring best-performing cohort (90%+ WR +$32.33 avg) to appropriate model saves foregone PnL on every high-conf trade
rules.review_note: perpetual_improvement_2026-04-30T18: APPLIED. HIGH_CONFIDENCE now routes to Opus in AGGRESSIVE tier. Expected +32/trade on 9.4% of trades.
rules.code_change: usage_tiers.py: HIGH_CONFIDENCE moved HIGH_VALUE_TRIGGERS (→ Opus in AGGRESSIVE); removed from MEDIUM_VALUE_TRIGGERS (was Sonnet)

rules.description: BTC_BUY_BB = 69% WR. Second best setup after ETH_SELL_BB (70%). Tier-1 golden.
rules.problem: ETH_SELL_BB golden rule exists but BTC_BUY_BB (69% WR, validated 2172 signals) has no corresponding promotion
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — BTC BUY BB: +10pt confidence, bypass veto suppression at 20% rate
rules.action: ensemble.py proven_setups: add BTC_BUY_BB as tier-1; allow full size; +10pt confidence
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=91%, n=2172>=20: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

rules.description: Ranging regime: 4/16 = 25% WR — worst observed regime, below even illiquid (28.1%). Structurally losing.
rules.problem: ILLIQUID_regime_block exists but ranging regime (25% WR) has no size/confidence treatment despite being the worst performer
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — ranging regime: reduce position 40%, require confidence >70%, widen stops 20%
rules.action: Same pattern as ILLIQUID_regime_block: detect ranging regime from Regime Agent output, apply treatment
rules.escalation_reason: Ranging regime: 25% WR on 16 trades. Structural negative edge similar to illiquid. Reduce exposure 50%.

rules.description: HYPE_BUY_CS = 38% WR. Dead setup. SKIP all CS-only HYPE longs.
rules.problem: HYPE_SELL_BB block exists but HYPE_BUY confidence_scorer longs (38% WR) have no penalty
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — HYPE BUY from confidence_scorer: -12pt confidence penalty applied
rules.action: ensemble.py: detect HYPE BUY + confidence_scorer sole signal; apply -12 confidence penalty
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=90%, n=2172>=20: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

rules.description: high_volatility regime = 55% WR. Best regime for trading. Increase confidence and size.
rules.problem: All non-illiquid regimes treated equally despite high_volatility having the highest WR (55%) — no promotion rule exists
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — high_volatility regime: +5pt confidence boost, 1.1x size multiplier
rules.action: signal_pipeline.py or ensemble.py: if regime==high_volatility, add +5 confidence and set size_mod=1.1
rules.expected_impact: Promoting best-performing regime should increase frequency and size of high_vol trades

escalation_history.reason: shadow n=2172, conf=88% — high_vol best regime confirmed

rules.description: SUSPEND SIDE_BIAS_LONG_filter: live 10d data shows LONG WR=57.1% = SHORT WR=56.9%. Rule was applying -8pt penalty based on stale 29-32% LONG WR data.
rules.problem: SIDE_BIAS_LONG_filter incorrectly penalises LONG signals; live 10d (n=352 LONG, n=613 SHORT) shows LONG and SHORT have identical WR. Penalty may be removing profitable LONG setups.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of LONG signals restored to no-penalty treatment to measure impact; SIDE_BIAS_LONG_filter gate reduced from full to 20%
rules.action: ensemble.py: remove -8pt LONG penalty for 20% cohort; track WR vs control. If LONG_no_penalty >= LONG_with_penalty, fully revert rule.
rules.contradiction: Rule claimed LONG WR=29-32%; live 10d shows LONG WR=57.1%. Reconcile data source before full suspension.

rules.description: BTC stop width too tight: avg win $273 vs avg loss $351 = 0.78 R:R. Expand BTC min stop to 1.3% to reduce outsized SL losses.
rules.problem: BTC losses are 28% larger than wins ($351 vs $273). BTC's stop width averages <0.83% overall but BTC is more volatile, causing stops to clip in noise and book larger-than-TP losses.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of BTC signals get min stop width enforced at 1.3% (vs uncapped default)
rules.action: signal_pipeline.py or leverage.py: if symbol==BTC, enforce stop_width = max(stop_width, entry * 0.013)
rules.expected_impact: Reducing BTC avg loss from $351 toward $250 could add ~$25K PnL on 267-trade window

rules.description: HYPE confirmed net-negative EV: -$12.63/trade (55.4% WR, 0.76 R:R). Full gate: all HYPE signals 0.5x size.
rules.problem: HYPE EV = 0.554*$154 - 0.446*$202 = -$4.63/trade. Across 397 trades = -$5,014. Win/loss asymmetry ($154 avg win vs $202 avg loss) makes HYPE structurally negative despite 55% WR. Re-confirmed 2026-04-25 on 965-trade dataset.
rules.fix_applied: Gate escalated to 100% — ALL HYPE signals get 0.5x size. Re-confirmed 2026-04-25 on 965-trade dataset.
rules.action: execution/leverage.py: if symbol==HYPE, multiply size_multiplier by 0.5. This is escalation of existing HYPE_sizing_reduce rule from 20% to 50% gate.
rules.expected_impact: Halving HYPE size reduces expected drag from -$5,014 to approximately -$2,507 per 397-trade window
rules.gate_escalated_reason: HYPE avg PnL -$12.63 confirmed negative EV: escalate to 75%

rules.description: SOL_BUY_BB = 67% WR. Third-best golden setup after ETH_SELL_BB (70%) and BTC_BUY_BB (69%). Tier-1.
rules.problem: ETH_SELL_BB and BTC_BUY_BB have golden rules but SOL_BUY_BB (67% WR, n=2172) has no corresponding promotion despite being third-highest-edge known setup
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — SOL BUY BB: +10pt confidence, bypass veto suppression at 20% rate
rules.action: ensemble.py proven_setups: add SOL_BUY_BB as tier-1; allow full size; +10pt confidence
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=90%, n=2172>=20: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

rules.description: BTC leads cross-asset: BTC win → ETH follows 60% of the time. Scout/Lead-Lag engine should watch BTC first.
rules.problem: Lead-lag relationship validated (n=2172, conf=0.85) but no active rule promotes ETH signals conditional on BTC recent win. Scout agent likely not using this cross-asset filter.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — when last BTC trade was a WIN: boost ETH signal confidence by +5pt; when BTC was LOSS: reduce ETH confidence by -5pt
rules.action: coordinator.py or signal_pipeline.py: read last BTC outcome from adaptive_risk_state, apply conditional boost to ETH signals

escalation_history.reason: shadow n=2172, conf=85% — lead-lag pattern consistently holds

rules.description: R:R 1.0-1.5 = 57% WR. Tighter TPs dramatically outperform wide ones. Wide TP2 targets rarely hit and drag down realized WR.
rules.problem: Current TP2 targets set aggressively wide (R:R 2.0-3.0). Data shows 57% WR only achieved with R:R 1.0-1.5. No active rule enforces tight-TP preference.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of signals get TP1 set to entry + (sl_distance * 1.25) max, capping R:R at 1.5
rules.action: signal_pipeline.py or position_manager.py: cap TP1 at entry ± (abs(entry-sl) * 1.5) for treatment cohort
rules.expected_impact: Moving WR from ~35-40% toward 57% by capping greedy TP2 targets; more trades close at TP1 instead of reversing
rules.gate_escalated_reason: conf=90%, n=2172>=30: sample requirement met, escalating 20%→50%

rules.description: In TRENDING regime, only 13% of early losses (<2h) are real signal failures. Don't allow Exit Agent to close trending positions <3h unless SL hit.
rules.problem: Exit Agent may over-actively close trending positions early, cutting into the 3-4h directional phase where real momentum develops. Wins need 3.3h median hold; early exits in trending are almost always false signals.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of trending-regime positions get min_hold=3h instruction injected into Exit Agent context; Exit Agent skips early-close recommendations <3h in trending
rules.action: agents/coordinator.py or exit agent prompt: when regime==trending, set min_hold_hours=3 in Exit Agent context; ignore close signals before 3h except hard SL hit
rules.expected_impact: Preventing early exits in trending regime should push trending WR from 52% toward the 4h+ cohort WR of 50-73% by letting winners run
rules.evidence: 164 live trades: trending early losses=8/61 (13%); loss median hold=1.5h, win median hold=3.3h; 12h+ cohort=73% WR

rules.description: In illiquid/ranging/unknown regime, 87% of early SL hits (<2h) are microstructure noise. Tighten exit or close proactively when position age <2h and approaching SL within 30%.
rules.problem: Bot holds positions in noise regimes through microstructure chop, absorbing full SL loss when the Exit Agent should close earlier at smaller loss. 87% of early losses (53/61) are in illiquid/ranging/unknown regimes.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of illiquid/ranging/unknown positions get proactive-exit instruction: if position_age < 2h AND price within 30% of SL, Exit Agent recommends close
rules.action: exit agent prompt: in non-trending regimes, add rule: 'if hold_time < 2h and price_distance_to_sl < 30%, recommend CLOSE to avoid noise-regime microstructure SL'
rules.expected_impact: Closing noise-regime positions at -0.5% avg instead of full SL -1.2% avg could reduce loss severity by 50%+ in 87% of early-exit cases
rules.evidence: 164 trades: 53/61 early losses in illiquid(27)+unknown(18)+ranging(8). Trending early losses only 8. Causal: microstructure bid-ask + low-liquidity noise in first 1-2h.

rules.description: SOL_SHORT_ensemble = 63.7% WR, +$5807 on 179 trades. Primary alpha source. Boost SOL SHORT signals.
rules.problem: SOL SHORT highest-PnL setup in 10d dataset (+$5807) but no dedicated confidence promotion rule
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of SOL SHORT ensemble signals get +5pt confidence boost and 1.1x size multiplier
rules.action: ensemble.py or signal_pipeline.py: if symbol==SOL and side==SHORT, apply +5pt confidence boost in A/B cohort
rules.suspension_reason: Live paper trading (52 actual trades): SOL WR=34.6%, PnL=-$176.24, SL_rate=82.7%. Backtest claim 63.7% WR not validated in live conditions. Suspended 2026-04-25 hourly run.
rules.expected_impact: +$32.4/trade average; capturing more of the only reliably profitable setup
rules.notes: | 2026-04-28: 10d data shows SOL_SHORT = 63.7% WR, n=179, +$5807 PnL — contradiction may be resolved. Needs human review to unsuspend.
rules.gate_change_reason: auto_fix_run28: Gate changed from 20->0. Rule was SUSPENDED but gate=20 left 20% A/B cohort eligible. SOL_SHORT_LIVE_CONTRADICTION (gate=100, conf=95) takes precedence. Reactivation criteria: 30+ live trades WR>55% in trending regime with stops>=1.0%.

rules.description: BTC_LONG=63.9% WR +$1839 (72 trades). BTC_SHORT=53.8% WR -$1408 (195 trades). Boost LONG, reduce SHORT.
rules.problem: BTC LONG wins 63.9% but bot generates 2.7x more BTC SHORTs. SHORT side losing -$1408 vs LONG +$1839.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — BTC LONG +5pt confidence; BTC SHORT -5pt confidence in treatment cohort
rules.action: signal_pipeline.py or ensemble.py: BTC LONG +5 conf (A/B); BTC SHORT -5 conf (A/B)
rules.expected_impact: Reduce BTC SHORT frequency ~20%; ~+$280 avoided losses per 100-trade window

escalation_history.reason: n=267 live, conf=83% — BTC LONG 63.9% vs SHORT 53.8% confirmed

rules.description: Confidence 60-70% bin: 46.3% WR, -$2321 on 123 trades. Worst bin. Raise minimum floor to 70%.
rules.problem: 60-70% signals structurally negative at 46.3% WR with 0.76 payoff ratio = -$18.87/trade est.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of 60-70% confidence signals rejected outright (floor raised to 70%)
rules.action: core/signal_pipeline.py: A/B cohort rejects signals where confidence < 70 after quality adjustment
rules.expected_impact: Filtering 123/965 (13%) of trades that are net -$2321 removes -$18.87/signal avg

escalation_history.reason: n=123 live, conf=85% — 46.3% WR worst bin, floor raise validated

rules.description: 90%+ confidence SHORT trades are the primary profit driver. Amplify this edge.
rules.problem: 90%+ confidence SHORT trades account for $2942 of total $905 PnL (325%). 9.4% of trades carry all profitability. BTC_SHORT@90%+: 67.4% WR $4425. SOL_SHORT@90%+: 71.4% WR $548.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: boost SHORT position size 1.5x when confidence >= 90%. Monitor for 20% of qualifying trades.
rules.notes: HYPE_SHORT@90%+ excluded from boost (42% WR, -$1135 — separate block rule HYPE_SHORT_block_high_conf)

escalation_history.reason: 90%+ short trades primary profit driver, conf=82%

rules.description: BTC stop widths are too tight — 66.4% of BTC SL hits are noise stops (<0.5% width).
rules.problem: 71 of 107 BTC SL hits triggered on moves < 0.5%. At 2x avg leverage this means trading against own noise floor. BTC overall WR 56.6% but $431 PnL on 267 trades = thin edge being destroyed by noise.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: reject BTC signals where abs(entry-sl)/entry < 0.007 (0.7%). 20% of BTC signals tested.
rules.notes: SOL noise SL rate is 29.6% (107 SLs, 32 noise) - less severe, not gating yet. HYPE 5.2% - not an issue.

rules.description: HYPE SHORT at 90%+ confidence is paradoxically worse — 42% WR, -$1135. High conf is miscalibrated here.
rules.problem: HYPE_SHORT@90%+: 42.3% WR on 26 trades, -$1135 PnL. HYPE_SHORT overall is 54.4% WR but high-confidence filter selects the bad ones. Likely confidence calibration error specific to HYPE SHORT overconfidence scenarios.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: block HYPE SHORT signals when confidence >= 90%. 20% of HYPE SHORT signals tested.
rules.notes: Counter-intuitive finding: high confidence HYPE SHORT underperforms. Could indicate regime mismatch or data artifact — A/B at 20% is appropriate caution.

rules.description: 60-70% confidence bin is net-negative after 123 trades. This segment destroys PnL.
rules.problem: 60-70% confidence: 46.3% WR, -$2320.54 PnL on 123 trades. At 46% WR with typical 1.5-2:1 R:R this should break even but doesn't. Net drag of ~$19/trade on average. Remove this tier or raise floor to 70%.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: raise effective confidence floor to 70% for 50% of signals (confidence_floor soft-block). Parallel tracking of blocked vs passed signals.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: CONF_CALIBRATION_RESOLVED: 965-trade data confirms 60-70% is negative. Escalated from 50% to 80%.
rules.notes: If existing CONF_60_70_floor_raise rule is already active, this is a reinforcing confirmation. Check interaction. Overlapping rule risk: CONF_60_70_floor_raise already A/B at 20% (baseline 0.463 matches). | 2026-04-28: Gate escalated 80→100% after 10d data confirmed 46.3% WR on n=123, -$2320 PnL.
rules.review_note: treatment_wr == baseline_wr (0.463) — rule has no effect. Reviewed 2026-04-29T19:18:13.874877+00:00.
rules.archive_reason: treatment_wr (0.463) == baseline_wr (0.463) — zero net improvement. Superseded by runtime rule conf_floor_70_v1 (penalize -20pts for 60-70% confidence). Archived by perpetual_deep_dive 2026-05-07.

rules.description: SOL_SHORT is the highest-WR combo in the dataset. Amplify with appropriate sizing.
rules.problem: SOL_SHORT: 63.7% WR on 179 trades, $5807 PnL — the single highest-PnL combo. At 90%+ confidence: 71.4% WR. Yet SOL_LONG is only 53.3% WR. Directional asymmetry confirmed: SOL is a strong SHORT candidate.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: boost SOL SHORT position size 1.3x when confidence >= 80%. 20% of SOL SHORT trades tested.
rules.suspension_reason: Live paper trading 52 actual trades: SOL WR=34.6%, -$176.24. Backtest 63.7% WR not validated. Suspended 2026-04-25 hourly run.
rules.notes: Consistent with SOL_SHORT_edge_promote rule already in rules (conf=90%, gate=20%). This extends to conf>=80 threshold and adds sizing boost specifically. Check for overlap/conflict with existing rule. | 2026-04-28: 10d data shows SOL_SHORT = 63.7% WR, n=179, +$5807 PnL — contradiction may be resolved. Needs human review to unsuspend.
rules.gate_change_reason: auto_fix_run28: Gate 20->0. SOL_SHORT_LIVE_CONTRADICTION (gate=100, conf=95) makes this promotion logically dead-code. Companion fix to SOL_SHORT_edge_promote.

rules.description: SNIPER_AUTO_EXECUTE=false blocks +$328/34-trade alpha path. Pending safety verification before re-enable.
rules.problem: Per AUTONOMOUS_SESSION_2026_04_15 Finding 1+14: 34 sniper/anticipatory trades = +$328 vs -$76 from all other strategies. Bot turned off after -$147 blowup (9.7x leverage bypassed 5.0 cap). Cannot auto-apply — requires manual safety check of leverage cap enforcement.
rules.fix_applied: BLOCKED: requires human review. Tracked here to prevent duplicate analysis.
rules.notes: Action: verify max_sniper_leverage=5.0 cap is enforced at OrderExecutor level. Add per-trade-loss ceiling ($50 or 10% equity). Then re-enable. DO NOT auto-apply.

rules.description: SOL_SHORT confirmed net-negative: -$154.35 on 30 trades (33% WR). Block all SOL SHORT signals at 100% gate.
rules.problem: SOL_SHORT produces -$154.35 net PnL over 30 trades at 33% WR — definitive negative-EV setup
rules.fix_applied: Full gate at 100% — no SOL SHORT signals pass ensemble without manual override

rules.description: Instrument MFE/MAE capture on positions to measure trailing stop leakage
rules.problem: No visibility into how much profit trailing phase leaves on table. Avg winning trade shrank from 7 to  in last 30.
rules.fix_applied: CONFIG_ONLY: add mfe_mae_tracking=true to trading_config; log peak_favorable_excursion per trade to trades.csv
rules.expected_impact: Data capture only; unblocks diagnosis of trailing stop calibration

rules.description: Cap leverage by confidence tier: <75% = max 3x, 75-85% = max 5x, >85% = full
rules.problem: Larger positions (>1.5x) have 40% WR vs 60% for smaller, yet high-confidence signals route to max leverage
rules.fix_applied: GATE_ONLY: activate confidence-proportional sizing cap at 20% gate in leverage.py
rules.expected_impact: Reduce outsized losses from high-leverage, low-edge trades

rules.source: perpetual_improvement_2026-04-29_hourly — circuit state analysis (4 consecutive losses at shutdown)
rules.description: Soft-start gate: first 10 trades after restart with ≥4 recorded consecutive losses use 0.5x position size multiplier.
rules.problem: Bot's last 4 trades were SL hits (HYPE -$38.80, SOL -$12.93 + 2 prior). On restart, circuit breaker may pause immediately, or if it doesn't, bot enters with max sizing into a context where recent signals have been losing. Soft-start allows gradual re-engagement while confirming signal quality has improved.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of restarts apply 0.5x sizing for first 10 trades. Track trade-10 PnL vs baseline.
rules.action: bot/execution/position_manager.py or bot/execution/leverage.py: on_start(), if consecutive_losses >= 4: set soft_start_trades_remaining=10, apply 0.5x multiplier until counter exhausted.
rules.expected_impact: Reduces risk of early post-restart blowup by halving size during the 'cold re-entry' period; cost is slightly reduced gains on early wins, benefit is significantly reduced loss when first signals are still poor quality.
rules._escalation_reason: Bot offline 10+ days with 4 consecutive losses; safety rule needs max coverage on restart

rules.description: BTC_LONG = 18% WR on 17 live trades. Structural loser across all regimes.
rules.problem: BTC_LONG pattern: 17 trades at 18% WR, net -$0.08 but EV negative. No explicit filter exists.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — BTC LONG signals get -15pt confidence penalty; require conf>75% to pass
rules.action: ensemble.py / signal_pipeline.py: detect BTC BUY signals; apply -15 confidence penalty; minimum conf threshold 75%

rules.source: master_engine_run_2026-06-20 auto-fix subsystem — conf=75%, investigation flagged Run97
rules.description: 60-70% confidence bin: 14% WR (1/7 trades, -$920 net in 10d_v3 backtest). Penalize signals in this confidence range.
rules.problem: 14% WR at 60-70% confidence in most recent 10d_v3 dataset (n=7). Structurally negative. conf_floor_70_v1 previously deactivated — deactivation reason unknown. Re-adding as new entry with gate=20 for investigation probe.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — apply -20pt confidence penalty to signals in 60-70% confidence band
rules.action: signal_pipeline.py: if 60 <= confidence < 70, subtract 20pt in treatment cohort
rules.expected_impact: 14% WR at 60-70% conf (-$920 net in 10d_v3). Filtering via gate=20 to probe effect before wider deployment.
rules.auto_fix_note: Applied by master_engine_run 2026-06-20. Confidence exactly at 75% threshold. Investigation note: prior conf_floor_70_v1 was DEACTIVATED (reason unknown) — this is a fresh probe entry. Do not escalate gate without reviewing deactivation history first.

rules.description: Block HYPE_LONG signals — live WR=23% on 35 trades, -$77.26 total
rules.problem: HYPE_LONG is #2 bleeder (-$77.26 live). 23% WR is definitively negative-EV at any R:R below 3.3:1
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of HYPE_LONG signals blocked outright; remainder require conf>=85 + trending + morning to pass
rules.action: Block HYPE_LONG unless confidence>=85 AND regime=trending AND morning_session
rules.escalation_reason: HYPE_LONG: 23% WR on 35 live trades (n>min_sample=20). Definitive negative edge — full block.

rules.description: Block SOL_LONG signals — live WR=24% on 34 trades, -$21.89 total
rules.problem: SOL_LONG is #3 bleeder (-$21.89 live). 24% WR with current R:R is negative-EV.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of SOL_LONG signals blocked outright; remainder require conf>=80 + trending to pass
rules.action: Block SOL_LONG unless confidence>=80 AND regime=trending
rules.escalation_reason: n=34 live trades @ 24% WR — definitive negative edge; same threshold as HYPE_LONG_hard_block escalated last run

rules.description: Widen stops 30% in illiquid regime — 50.8% noise-stop rate on high-confidence signals
rules.problem: 50.8% of SL hits (188/370) came from conf>75 signals in noisy conditions. Stops too tight for actual volatility.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of illiquid-regime signals get SL distance * 1.3x and size * 0.7x to maintain risk budget
rules.action: Multiply SL distance 1.3x and reduce size 30% in illiquid regime
rules.escalation_reason: n=57 illiquid trades confirm 71.9% noise-stop rate — full confirmation; escalate 80→100%

rules.description: ALL confidence bins are systematically overconfident by 15-34 points vs realized WR. 90%+ conf = 56% WR (34pt gap); 80-90% = 60% WR (25pt gap). Existing rules target 60-70% bin but ignore upper-bin inflation.
rules.problem: High-conf signals (80%+) are overconfident by 25-34 points. HIGH_CONF_SHORT_edge promotes 90%+ shorts based on WR data, but the confidence number itself is unreliable — sizing and filter decisions are trusting inflated confidence scores across ALL bins. confidence_scorer.py likely has systematic inflation.
rules.fix_applied: AUDIT_ONLY: flag for human review of confidence_scorer.py. No auto-gate yet — systematic deflation needs careful calibration to avoid breaking existing rules that depend on confidence thresholds.
rules.action: Audit bot/strategies/confidence_scorer.py for inflation sources. Consider adding a global calibration factor (multiply raw confidence by 0.80) or building a per-bin realized-WR lookup table.
rules.notes: Existing CONF_60_70_all_block addresses the worst bin but leaves 80-90% and 90%+ untouched. Those bins drive biggest sizing decisions. HYPE_SHORT_block_high_conf is a symptom of this wider calibration problem.

rules.description: Last 200 of 965 trades are 100% BTC. Symbol concentration: SOL_SHORT (best edge, +$5807, 64% WR) and HYPE trades have disappeared from recent signals.
rules.problem: Recent trading period is BTC-only. SOL_SHORT (the bot's highest-PnL combo) suspended at SOL_SHORT_full_block (100% gate). If that block is overly aggressive based on 30-trade live sample vs 179-trade backtest, the bot may be blocking its primary alpha source. Net result: BTC-only operation missing SOL edge.
rules.fix_applied: MONITORING_ONLY: log symbol concentration each run. If last 200 trades are >80% single-symbol, alert for review.
rules.action: Human review: evaluate SOL_SHORT_full_block suspension (30 live trades at 33% WR vs 179 backtest at 64% WR). If live data window is stale, unsuspend with 0.5x sizing cap as test.
